_comment: Synthetic ICICI credit-card golden vector (no real data). Ported from the web engine's test_cc_reader_characterization.py _ICICI case; values captured from a live run of icici.reader.read_lines. amount/date are strings (re-parsed to Decimal/NaiveDate — never float). description_raw keeps the leading serial exactly as the web engine emits it.
